data.description:
Rec 3 of session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md (risk R1/R2). .github/workflows/ contains only release.yml; 1,302 pytest tests and 118 standalone tests/scripts/test-*.sh bash suites run on no trigger. Every other audit recommendation's safety argument is "the suite catches it" — make that automatic FIRST.

Work:
- Add .github/workflows/test.yml on push/PR: pip install -e '.[dev]' + pytest, on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest (platform-compat lessons live in test-ticket-platform-compat.sh).
- Add a small pytest collector that parametrizes over tests/scripts/test-*.sh and asserts exit 0, so pytest is the single entry point and a failing bash suite fails CI.
- Keep tier markers; gate live-Jira/network tiers out of default CI.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test.yml runs on push + PR, ubuntu + macOS
- [ ] All 118 bash suites are collected via pytest and fail CI on nonzero exit
- [ ] Network/live-Jira tiers are excluded from default CI run (documented)
- [ ] README Tests section documents the single entry point
data.title: CI: run the full test suite on push/PR (pytest + bash-suite collector)
